title: Tuzu's modpack
description: Modpack which combines technical, magical and exploration mod all into one package.
body:
# This modpack combines technical, magical and exploration mods all into one package.

Some notable mods include
- [Ad astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), Mod which allows you to explore other planets.
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs), Which adds almost 90 new mobs.
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves), Five new cave biomes.
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether), Nether update on steroids.
- [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend), Much needed end update.
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), amazing mod which adds many new ways to automate.
- [PneumaticCraft: Repressurized](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumaticcraft-repressurized), Cool stuff with compressed air.
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), New amazing world generation.
- And much, much more.

**TO-DO**
- Icon
- Add immersive engineering back.
- Add custom main menu.
- Add quest system
